title: Tūndla Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tūndla with a Z-Score of +3.83. This critical event has a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tūndla is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 59%, and the wind speed is 5.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
